archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) blended with premium Islamic elegance (Luxury)

spacing_and_layout.container: max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen relative overflow-hidden bg-[#FDFBF7] shadow-2xl pb-24

bottom_nav.style: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 max-w-md mx-auto bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-[#E8EAE3] pb-6 pt-3 px-6 flex justify-between items-center z-50 rounded-t-3xl

hero_prayer_card.style: relative w-full rounded-3xl overflow-hidden bg-gradient-to-br from-[#0F4C3A] to-[#0A3629] p-6 text-white mb-6 shadow-xl
hero_prayer_card.image_overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-black/20 mix-blend-overlay object-cover z-0 w-full h-full
hero_prayer_card.content_wrapper: relative z-10 flex flex-col items-start gap-2

bento_widget.style: bg-white rounded-3xl p-5 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] border border-[#E8EAE3]/50 flex flex-col gap-3 transition-transform active:scale-95

images.description: Abstract white sand dunes for a serene, pure prayer background.
Intricate Islamic architecture and arches for the Quran or Mosque section header.
Moon in dark clouds for evening adhkar or night mode.

icons.usage_rules: Use stroke-width 1.5. Flip direction-based icons (like arrows) since the app is RTL.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the app as a mobile-first web app imitating a React Native Expo app. Wrap everything in a `max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen relative shadow-2xl` container so it looks like a mobile phone screen on desktop browsers.
CRITICAL: Add `dir='rtl'` to the root container. All text and layouts must be strictly right-to-left.
Use 'Tajawal' for all UI text, buttons, and descriptions. Use 'Amiri' for large Arabic headings, Islamic quotes, and Quranic verses.
Inject the Google Fonts import into the global CSS.

The Hero Section on the Home tab should be a prominent prayer card showing the next prayer time (e.g., 'صلاة العصر' - Asr) and a countdown. Use the `hero_prayer_background` image with an absolute positioning, `object-cover`, and a soft black overlay (`bg-black/30`) over the `primary` green container.

Build a Bento Grid layout for the main dashboard: A wide prominent card for the 'Daily Hadith' (الحديث اليومي), a square widget for 'Digital Tasbih' (المسبحة), and a square widget for 'Qibla' (القبلة).

Implement a persistent Bottom Navigation bar with 5 items: الرئيسية (Home), القرآن (Quran), الأذكار (Adhkar), القبلة (Qibla), إيثاق AI (AI Assistant). Make sure it respects bottom safe area by adding `pb-6`.
For the 'Digital Tasbih' view, create a large, satisfying circular button in the center with a ripple animation effect and a prominent counter.
For the AI Assistant feature, build a chat interface that looks clean and supportive, tailored for answering Islamic fiqh questions.
Make sure EVERY interactive element (buttons, tabs, widgets) includes a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='tab-home'`, `data-testid='tasbih-increment-btn'`).
Avoid generic gray backgrounds. Use the designated warm off-white (#FDFBF7) background to maintain a paper-like, sacred, and organic feel.
